item.name: Crenicichla
item.description:
Found in the fast-flowing waters that cut through the Dewspun Bank, this wavekin is adorned with finely patterned scales.

[Suitable for printing on medium canvases.]

fish.guide: This Turali cichlid's delicate fins are a sight to behold in motion─if one can find a pristine specimen. Crenicichla are possessed of a rather aggressive demeanor, and their fins often end up ragged and torn from frequent bouts of intraspecies sparring.
